name: Google Analytics
description: Retrieve and analyze Google Analytics data including reports, real-time metrics, account summaries, and custom dimensions. Read-only access to GA4 properties via the official Google Analytics MCP server.
user_auth_instructions:
Click 'Connect' to link your Google account.
You'll be prompted to sign in and grant read-only access to your Google Analytics properties.
setup_notes:
Uses Google's official Google Analytics MCP server (analytics-mcp).

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
2. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (type: Web application)
3. Add authorized redirect URI:
   {your_app_url}/api/v1/mcp-servers/{server_id}/oauth/callback
4. Enable the Google Analytics APIs:
   - Google Analytics Admin API
   - Google Analytics Data API
5. Enter the Client ID and Client Secret

Provides read-only access to GA4 data. Cannot modify GA settings.
